stemHtml: You are on the approach to land when you get an indication that the undercarriage might not be down and locked. You request the tower for a flyby. Which of the following statements covers the correct phraseology and order of information?

options.a: “3x Pan Pan - Station call sign - your Callsign - Reason - Intention - ...”
options.b: “3x Mayday - Station call sign - your Callsign - Intention - Reason - ... “
options.c: “3x Pan Pan Medical - Station call sign - your Callsign - Reason - Intention - ... “
options.d: “Pan Pan - Station call sign - your Callsign - Intention - Reason - …”
